security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420 https://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Local PNG/JPG/WebP → SVG vectorizer with white-background removal.
bundle.longDescription: Hazakura Vectorizer turns raster logos and icons into reusable SVG and PNG assets on your machine. It removes white backgrounds with a live preview, then vectorizes the cutout with vtracer. Outputs include the original SVG, monochrome SVG variants, and 512/1024 px PNG exports. Everything runs locally — your images never leave the device.
